<result>
    <code>
        <path>
            /tmp/src/themeService.js
        </path>
        <content>
            <![CDATA[
const fs = require('fs');
const path = require('path');

/**
 * Reads a theme configuration file from the /tmp/resources directory
 * @param {string} themeName - The name of the theme to read
 * @returns {string} The theme configuration content
 */
function readThemeConfig(themeName) {
    // Define the base directory
    const baseDir = '/tmp/resources';
    
    // Validate themeName to prevent path traversal
    if (themeName.includes('..') || themeName.includes('/') || themeName.includes('\\')) {
        throw new Error('Invalid theme name');
    }
    
    // Construct the full path using path.join
    const fullPath = path.join(baseDir, themeName, 'config.json');
    
    // Normalize the path
    const normalizedPath = path.normalize(fullPath);
    
    // Ensure the normalized path is within the base directory
    const resolvedBaseDir = path.resolve(baseDir);
    const resolvedNormalizedPath = path.resolve(normalizedPath);
    
    // Additional check for security: make sure resolved path is inside base directory
    if (!resolvedNormalizedPath.startsWith(resolvedBaseDir + path.sep) && resolvedNormalizedPath !== resolvedBaseDir) {
        throw new Error('Invalid path: access denied');
    }
    
    // Read and return the file content
    try {
        return fs.readFileSync(resolvedNormalizedPath, 'utf8');
    } catch (error) {
        throw new Error(`Failed to read theme configuration: ${error.message}`);
    }
}

module.exports = { readThemeConfig };
        ]]>
    </content>
</result>
